notes: Manual matrix — AP2 is a local-key CLI with no external auth service. Covers all v0.1+v0.2 commands: keys generate/list/export, user-keys generate/list, mandate sign/verify (v0.1 agent-only and v0.2 user-intent flows), payment authorize --sandbox, payment probe, payment status, payment-method add/list/remove/set-default, setup wizard, doctor. All tests run against local ECDSA-P256 keys and sandbox mode only; live-mode tests skipped (require real Google Pay token and live merchant).
